phase_title: Governed Execution Attempt Artifact Trust Hardening

No Telegram inbound. No Telegram polling. No remote shell. No /run. No enforcement. No automatic apply. No apply execution. No patch parsing. No commit/push authorization. No real AI backend calls. No executable artifact-only invocation path. No execution enablement flag. No execution availability toggle. No cryptographic signing. No remote attestation. No database-backed audit storage. No shell mediation. No rollback execution. No file mutation rollback. No automatic restore. No git reset/checkout/revert execution. Telegram remains outbound-only. Execution remains unavailable. All authorization flags remain False. No source changes.
summary: Phase 99C complete: Governed Execution Attempt Artifact Trust Hardening. Test-only. 196 trust hardening tests: digest determinism and coverage, tamper detection, authorization flag trust, safety flag trust, future-only state trust, denial reason trust, hard no-go trust, reference validation, verification error contract, no-execution guards, 99B contract preservation, Phase 97/98 preflight preservation, report trust preservation.
